# Arco Fit Gym & Wellness

> 27,000 sq ft strength training and group fitness facility in Fulshear, TX

## About

Arco Fit Gym & Wellness is a locally owned, family-operated gym in Fulshear, Texas. Founded by Jason McCourt, Jeremy Koger, and Matt Caldwell, the gym emphasizes science-backed fitness and strength training in a welcoming environment for all experience levels. The 27,000 sq ft facility features over 120 pieces of hand-selected equipment.

## Location

6527 Skyline Dr, Building C
Fulshear, TX 77441
Phone: (346) 553-2726
Email: Info@arcofitgym.com

## Services

### Training
- Strength training floor with 120+ pieces of premium equipment
- Personal training with on-site certified trainers
- One free personal training session for every new member

### Group Fitness
- HIIT and circuit training (Xtreme45, The Sweat Theory)
- Dance fitness (Dance Lab, BollyX)
- Cardio kickboxing
- Movement by Design (functional strength)
- Core training (Build: Core)

### Wellness
- Reformer Pilates
- Yoga classes
- Yoga teacher training

### Amenities
- Separate men's and women's custom saunas
- Posing room with mirrors and lighting
- Kids club
- Smoothie bar and shop
- Dedicated cardio area

https://www.arcofitgym.com
